fault_diagnosis.label: Fault Diagnosis & Problem Solving
fault_diagnosis.description: Identifying problems, diagnosing faults, and evaluating situations systematically with incomplete information
fault_diagnosis.employer_signal: Can identify root causes without supervision. Doesn't guess — thinks systematically.

communication.label: Communication & Customer Handling
communication.description: Conveying technical or complex information clearly, managing customer expectations, and working effectively with others
communication.employer_signal: Handles clients independently. Can explain problems and set expectations without escalating.

resource_judgment.label: Resource & Cost Judgment
resource_judgment.description: Making decisions about costs, materials, time, and resources under real constraints
resource_judgment.employer_signal: Makes sound decisions under resource constraints. Doesn't waste materials or overbuy.

process_quality.label: Process & Quality Control
process_quality.description: Following or designing repeatable processes, catching errors before they compound, and maintaining consistent output quality
process_quality.employer_signal: Work is consistent. Catches their own errors. Doesn't need constant checking.

operational_organization.label: Operational Organization
operational_organization.description: Managing multiple tasks, jobs, or people simultaneously without a formal system — tracking what needs to happen and making sure it does
operational_organization.employer_signal: Can handle volume without dropping things. Self-manages under pressure.
